name: Zen gravel inset
description: Gravel inset rectangle on a wooden floor — a meditative zen patch.
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.floor_pattern_zen_inset.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
style_affinity: East-Asian (Japanese/Chinese) motif. Coherent in japanese/chinese (and fantasy). Out of place in Western, Gothic, Renaissance, Modern, Mediterranean buildings — use only if the building is East-Asian.
